subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath manifested His Cause and sent down His verses, and commanded all to observe that which is righteous. Verily, He is the All-Commanding, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر امره و انزل آیاته و امر الکل بالمعروف انه هو الامر العلیم الحکیم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action
